title: ochrosia hexandra
intro: Ochrosia hexandra, also known as the 'Ironwood', is a plant species native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ochrosia hexandra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are made from the leaves, bark, and roots of the plant.
